headline: Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
description: SDLC is the structured process for planning, creating, testing, and deploying software. Phases: Planning → Requirements → Design → Implementation → Testing → Deployment → Maintenance. Models: Waterfall (sequential), Agile (iterative), DevOps (continuous). SDLC reduces risk, manages complexity, and ensures quality.

citation.name: Software Engineering: A Practitioner's Approach (10th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Pressman R.S., Maxim B.R.

citation.name: Agile, DevOps, and SDLC in 2025: A Comprehensive Survey
citation.author: multiple
